title: Resolution Adopting Administrative Order No. 13 Dated December 7, 2023 of the Office of the President Entitled " Authorizing the Grant of Gratuity Pat to Contract of Service and Job Order Workers in Government for Fiscal Year 2023". Councilor(s) Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C. Pelegrina, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Jerwin A. Moliñawe, Gaudencio P. Macatangay, Samantha Nicole A. Banasihan 12/19/2023
